rewritten_requirements: The system shall place a newly acquired plane in an 'Order' state until it is delivered.
The system shall transition a plane from 'Arrival' to 'Preparation' upon its arrival.
The system shall assign a prepared plane to either 'Operations' or 'Maintenance' based on its condition and schedule.
The system shall keep a plane in the 'Operations' state if it still has scheduled flights.
The system shall send a plane to 'Maintenance' when there are no more scheduled flights or maintenance is required.
The system shall transition a plane from 'Maintenance' to 'Preparation' after checking and servicing it until it is ready for operations.
The system shall take a plane out of service if it is no longer available for use.
The system shall remove a plane from its operations when it is permanently withdrawn from service.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system places a newly acquired plane on order until delivery.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'When a plane is first acquired, it is placed on order and remains in that stage until it is delivered.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Upon arrival, the system prepares the plane for use in flights.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'Once the plane arrives, it is prepared so that it can be used for flights.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system assigns a prepared plane to regular operations or maintenance based on its condition and schedule.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'After completing a flight, it may either be assigned to another flight or sent for maintenance, depending on its condition and schedule.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the plane still has scheduled flights, it continues being used in operations.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'If the plane still has more flights to operate, it continues being used.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When no more flights are scheduled or maintenance is required, the system sends the plane for maintenance.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'But when there are no more flights scheduled, or if maintenance is required, it is sent for maintenance.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: During maintenance, the system checks and services the plane until it is ready to return to operations.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'During maintenance, the plane is checked and serviced. Once it is ready again, it becomes available for use and can return to normal operations.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If a plane is no longer available for use, the system takes it out of service.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'If at any point the plane is no longer available for use, it is taken out of service.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: In cases where a plane is permanently withdrawn from service, it is removed from the system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'In some cases, the plane may be permanently withdrawn, after which it is no longer part of the system.'
